title: What Scripture Actually Says About Authority
caption:
Scripture never handed a man a crown and called it authority. It handed him a towel.

The first model wasn't "I'm in charge, follow me." It was a basin. A servant before the supper. A man who went first into the cost before he asked anyone else to follow.

Real leadership — the kind that outlasts the org chart — is built on absorption, not rank. First into the hit. First into the apology. The man who covers his people and leads whether anyone's watching or not.

That's not a leadership philosophy. That's what the cross looked like in a life.

Which of these hits hardest? Save this for the man you're becoming.

#faith #christianmen #leadership #godlymen #manofgod #christianity #discipleship #scripture
theme: He leads by going first into the cost.
